svg.text: 820-02757 — FPC CABLE RUN: JT200 → KEYBOARD MODULE
25 Interleaved DRIVE/SENSE Traces · Contamination Pathway Analysis

g.text: via capillary action along trace gaps
Ultrasonic bath (40 kHz) can reach internal FPC trace gaps via micro-cavitation.
However, FPC must be disconnected first. Internal contamination may persist despite surface cleaning.

svg.text: 820-02757-06 Logic Board · FPC Cable Render · Cola Spill Incident Documentation
